title: Electrification Action Plan has heat pumps at its heart
summary:
Heat pumps are at the centre of Europe’s path to electrification as set out in the European Commission’s action plan, published today.  The EU Electrification Action Plan wants heat pump installations to increase to 4 million per year by 2030, from 2.4 million in 2025. To ensure there is sufficient demand, it sets out measures […]
